summary: Frontend-only regression + feature validation of two new cinematic features. /artists horizontal-scroll Catalysts gallery and /about scroll-locked Metamorphosis story both work end-to-end. 0 console errors, 0 pageerrors across all 6 routes. Specifically confirmed: (1) /artists intro 'The Gems' heading renders, catalysts-scroll-section + sticky inner exist, catalyst-card-0..11 all in DOM, rail x-transform changes from matrix(... -134 ...) at scroll=500 to matrix(... -2887 ...) at scroll=3500 (visible cards rotate from [0..5] at 500 to [7..11] at 3500), catalysts-counter shows '/ 12 CATALYSTS', End cap renders. (2) /about intro 'Butterfly Effect.' heading renders, metamorphosis-story + stage-panel-0..3 all in DOM, canvas mounts inside metamorphosis-story, about-pillar-0/1/2 present, panel opacities transition correctly: [1,0,0,0] at top -> [0,1,0,0] at 1500 -> [0,0,0.43,0.38] at 3000, confirming panel-0 dominant at low scroll and panel-3 emerging at deep scroll. (3) Regression: all 6 routes (/ /radio /schedule /contact /artists /about) load with no JS errors. RadioPlayer fully functional: initial 'Avatar' -> click queue-item-2 -> 'NOT ANYMORE' -> next -> 'switch it up' -> prev -> 'NOT ANYMORE'; play toggle works. No 'Cannot set opacity' error on /about (previously fixed by removing material.opacity calls on group ref).

issues: Stage panel text crossfade overlap: at deep scroll the WINGS and CRYSTALLIZED panels visibly stack on top of each other (opacities 0.43 and 0.38 simultaneously) producing overlapping text headings. This is by design of the cross-fade keyframes (op2 [0.45,0.57,0.7,0.82] and op3 [0.72,0.85,0.95,1.0] both partial in the 0.72-0.82 band) but visually reads as overlapping text. Consider tightening the crossfade ranges so only one panel is ever above ~0.6 at a time.

action_items: Optional: tighten /about stage-panel opacity crossfades so adjacent panels do not visually overlap text headings (currently panel-2 and panel-3 both ~0.4 opacity in the 0.72-0.82 progress band).
critical_code_review_comments: AboutPage useTransform opacity keyframes for op2 ([0.45,0.57,0.7,0.82]) and op3 ([0.72,0.85,0.95,1.0]) overlap between progress 0.72-0.82 — this is the source of the dual-visible text observed at scroll=3000. Functionally fine; aesthetically a small refinement opportunity.

ArtistsPage rail measurement via useEffect on mount + resize is correct. With travel ~= 2887px and 420vh scroll section, the cards traverse smoothly. setTravel(0) default may flash a static rail on first frame before measure — currently imperceptible.

MetamorphosisScene correctly avoids the prior 'Cannot set opacity' bug by setting material.opacity only on individual mesh refs (cocoon, butterflyL/R, diamond) and never on the parent group ref — verified by 0 pageerrors during full scroll-through.
Suspense fallback for MetamorphosisScene is a black div — fine, but a very brief black flash on first /about visit before the canvas mounts. Acceptable.
Lenis smooth scroll continues to play well with framer-motion's useScroll on both pinned sections (sticky positioning intact; html/body overflow-x:clip strategy correctly preserves sticky).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new cinematic features (horizontal Catalysts gallery on /artists and Metamorphosis scroll-story on /about) are verified working with measured DOM transform/opacity values. RadioPlayer + queue sync regression-clean. The only sub-bug worth flagging is a minor visual overlap of stage-panel-2 and stage-panel-3 text at progress ~0.72-0.82 due to overlapping opacity keyframes — not a functional regression. /about canvas mounts cleanly via Suspense; no 'material.opacity' errors. For any future /artists changes, note that the rail's travel is computed once on mount + resize via rail.scrollWidth - window.innerWidth; changing card counts may need a remeasure trigger.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no functional bug. The /about visual text overlap at deep scroll traces to overlapping useTransform opacity ranges (op2 fades from 0.7->0.82 while op3 ramps in from 0.72->0.85). Mitigation if desired: change op2 final stop to 0.72 or op3 first stop to 0.82 so panels never both exceed ~0.5 opacity simultaneously.
